updates.title: May 2026 — Full Operational Refresh
updates.summary: Pending — this entry will be completed after the data run. Covers the largest gap since the database launch: 39–59 days of NEMWEB operational data, OpenElectricity performance data, AEMO Generation Information, and EPBC referrals. Key focus: BESS status transitions, NEM records set in late April / early May 2026.

data_refreshed.note: Coal unit outage and dispatch data

updates.data_quality_notes: Seven BESS projects with past COD dates reviewed for status transitions. collie-battery cod_current corrected to 2025-07 (both stages operational July 2025, ahead of original 2027 estimate).

updates.title: April 2026 — Intelligence & Value Factor
updates.summary: Added Value Factor Intelligence section to Revenue Intel with three new charts: Wind/Solar VF trend (2019–2025), State Cannibalisation Index, and Solar VF by Vintage. AEMO Generation Info and OpenElectricity Metadata refreshed. NEMWEB BESS bid data current to end of March 2026. NEM battery records updated to 16 April 2026.

new_operational.note: 700 MW / 1,400 MWh Origin Energy co-located BESS. Largest single BESS in NEM at commissioning.
540 MW / 1,080 MWh. CS Energy / Amp Energy.
850 MW / 1,680 MWh. NSW Government / Akaysha Energy. Largest NEM battery by MW.

nem_records.note: New NEM record during summer peak demand event
Spring solar oversupply driving record charge
New NEM record — batteries cycling twice in one day
Same day as discharge record — extreme solar event
